Re: “empowering enough people”: I think this is already well underway!!! When we started @aixventureshq back in 2021 (before ChatGPT!), I remember feeling that the supply of people with deep knowledge of modern neural networks—and hence good founder CTOs—was very restricted.

Indeed, AI is a great threat to gatekeeping cartels: 

“Anti-AI NY bill S7263 isn't consumer protection. It's cartel protection.”

Genuine question: has any of the super hyped up products ever been successful?

- Anthropic
- Lovable
- Replit
- Granola
- Vercel
- Supabase
- ElevenLabs

This is a really interesting post using the Enron email archive to test how good agents are at navigating work, and it provides some helpful evidence that agent swarms are less useful than agent organizations.

This story made me so happy! In the age of AI, you can just do things, including developing a cancer treatment for your dog! He asked ChatGPT to come up with a plan, sequenced his dog’s tumor, then used AlphaFold to identify the mutated proteins & had it synthesized into vaccine!
